privileged_info_summary: The task assigns a homeroom ('Room 101') to three Grade 9 students: Jason Miller, Ashley Davis, and Michael Wilson. All data is synthetic, created fresh during task setup in MariaDB. Room 101 is inserted into the school_rooms table with capacity 30. The three students are created in the students table with grade_level='9', is_active='Y', and homeroom initially set to NULL, requiring the agent to update them to 'Room 101'.
